svg.title: PJ5 — Sales management system
svg.desc: Layered Java/Spring Boot internal business app with full dev/test/release pipeline: Users/Admin → LB → Auth → Spring (Controller/Service/DAO/Batch) → RDBMS, with CI (JUnit + Coverage + Artifact) → Release and a bug-fix → hotfix feedback loop.
svg.text: PJ5 — Sales management system (Java / Spring Boot)

Users/Admin → LB → Auth → Controller → Service → DAO → MySQL/Oracle (primary / replica / read-only / backup / test / archive) · CI (JUnit + Coverage) → Artifact → Release · Ops → Bug Tracker → Fix → Hotfix loop
